latest_verified_ci.note: Latest main CI verified through GitHub REST API on 2026-06-03 before the reconciliation commit. Jobs frontend and smoke failed before this local reconciliation.

latest_local_validation.context: Phase 2D — Odoo LIVE_OK (100 items). Public edge + Caddy routing infrastructure is correct and validated externally (curl from host + nsenter from container net+mount namespace + the exact urllib probe from the container's own Python all return HTTP 200 in <120ms). Root cause of the persistent TimeoutError in the live in-process probe was TWO layered issues: (1) async deadlock — admin_connectors_truth was 'async def', so the blocking urlopen('https://vantage.elrace.com/healthz') froze the single uvicorn event loop and the returning self-hairpin /healthz request could never be served, producing a consistent 2-second TimeoutError; (2) DEPLOYMENT — the app image is built with 'build: .' and the source is NOT bind-mounted, so the code is baked into the image at build time. 'docker compose restart app' reuses the existing image and therefore kept running the OLD 'async def' code; restarting alone never picked up the host-side fix. Resolution: host repo fix committed (f7d2b66, apps/edr/app.py:1485 'async def' -> 'def'); the live container's filesystem (/proc/<pid>/root/app/apps/edr/app.py) was patched identically, its bytecode cache cleared, and the uvicorn process restarted — the running container now executes the sync 'def' handler (verified). Production remains NOT_PUBLIC_LIVE.
latest_local_validation.odoo_system_health: unknown,0 (intentional — workflow connectors not in health check_map)

latest_local_validation.public_edge_healthz_result: HTTP/2 200 application/json {status:ok,workflow_nodes:18,postgres:ok,redis:ok,qdrant:ok,minio:ok} — confirmed from host, container namespace, and container's own Python urllib
latest_local_validation.caddy_routing_spa_root_result: HTTP/2 200 text/html; charset=utf-8 — DecisionCenter SPA served correctly
latest_local_validation.cloudflare_tunnel: RUNNING — tunnel decisioncenter f39448f2-1898-41af-a055-fc98439088e1 routes vantage.elrace.com → http://caddy:80 (confirmed by traffic flow)
latest_local_validation.probe_handler_bug: async def admin_connectors_truth blocked the single uvicorn event loop during a blocking urlopen; the self-referential hairpin via Cloudflare could not be served, so the 2-second timeout was hit every time
latest_local_validation.probe_handler_fix: apps/edr/app.py:1485 changed from 'async def' to 'def' so FastAPI runs the handler in the anyio thread pool, keeping the event loop free to serve the returning /healthz. Committed to repo at f7d2b66 AND hot-patched into the running container's baked-in copy (code is not bind-mounted), then uvicorn restarted.
latest_local_validation.deployment_gotcha: app service uses 'build: .' with NO source bind-mount; 'docker compose restart app' does NOT load host code edits — only an image rebuild (docker compose build app && docker compose up -d app) makes a code change permanent across container recreation.
latest_local_validation.image_rebuild_required_for: permanence — the live hot-patch lives only in the container writable layer and is lost if the container is recreated/rebuilt; rebuild from the committed host repo (HEAD has the fix) to bake it in
latest_local_validation.nsenter_probe_result: HTTP 200 in 116ms from container net+mount namespace using the container's own Python urllib (exact probe code) — confirms infrastructure + probe code are correct

latest_local_validation.system_health_workflow_connectors: Mirrored to authoritative connector truth (connector_status.classify) instead of the old hard-coded ('unknown', 0). Live-verified with the running app env: Odoo -> ok (LIVE_OK, 100 records, ~1.8s round-trip), SharePoint -> unknown (CONFIGURED_NOT_TESTED, no safe server-side probe), Microsoft Graph -> unknown (CONFIGURED_NOT_TESTED), ownCloud -> error (NOT_CONFIGURED, OWNCLOUD_USERNAME missing). No false greens; consistent with the Connectors & APIs page.
latest_local_validation.system_health_change: apps/edr/app.py: _probe_with_latency now maps workflow connectors via connector_status.classify + _CONNECTOR_STATE_TO_HEALTH; admin_health_live offloads the blocking probe via fastapi.concurrency.run_in_threadpool so the Odoo webhook probe (timeout up to 10s) never blocks the event loop. 28/28 test_phase2b_health_cost tests pass in the container env.
latest_local_validation.system_health_note: Each System Health poll now triggers a real Odoo webhook fetch (~1.8s) — honest live truth at the cost of per-poll load; probe runs in a thread.

latest_reconciliation_validation.context: Owner-operator expectation reconciliation plus Odoo n8n headerAuth restoration. No app deploy was performed. Deployed n8n odoo_read workflow was intentionally updated and restarted to restore headerAuth, attach a Header Auth credential, and return explicit non-200 failures for bad Odoo calls.
